localizations.title: Frenzy at the Amusement Park
localizations.hiddenObject_1: Once you've assembled the entire wire fence, you will notice some significant gaps in the links.
localizations.hint_84: To retrieve the ticket, you'll need to correctly assemble the wire fence and identify the gaps in it.
localizations.hint_22: To retrieve the ticket, you'll need to correctly assemble the wire fence and identify the gaps in it.
localizations.hint_10: You can exchange money for tickets here.
localizations.hint_9: To retrieve the ticket, you'll need to find a long object with a sticky end.
localizations.hint_5: This chewed piece of gum is still quite sticky. If you combine it with the right thing, it can help you retrieve the ticket on the other side of the fence.
localizations.hint_50: He'll let you through if you show him a ticket.
localizations.hint_47: You can show it to the watchman to gain entry to the amusement park.
localizations.hint_19_first: The monkey stole something from the young women running the stall. It's somewhere nearby, and you'll need to find it.
localizations.hint_19: The monkey snatched the stallkeeper's other earring and hung it from a lamp above the stall.  It's much to high for you to reach, but you have the perfect tool to knock it loose!
localizations.hint_42: You'll need to give this back to the stallkeeper.
localizations.hint_4_first: The ball begins under the cup on the left.  It then shifts to the right, then to the center, and so on. Pay close attention to its position as it moves.
localizations.hint_4: After each shuffle, the monkey moves the cups closer to you. The ball (within its cup) will trace a path that forms a number.
localizations.hint_30: This attraction only requires 1 ticket. You might as well start here!
localizations.hint_77_first: There is only one orange duck left. Position your fishing rod to place the hook on this duck.
localizations.hint_77: Once you've positioned the fishing rod, the orange ducks will form a number.
localizations.hint_78_first: There is only one orange duck left. Position your fishing rod to place the hook on this duck.
localizations.hint_78: Once you've positioned the fishing rod, the orange ducks will form a number.
localizations.hint_2: You can make out a number on the button sewn onto the teddy bear.
localizations.hint_80: You can't get the machine to work; you'll need to figure out how to unjam it.
localizations.hint_88: This button has the same size and shape as a coin.
localizations.hint_1: You'll need to find a way to dislodge the coin. Something with a similar shape and size should do the trick.
localizations.hint_89: You've got some money! You can exchange it for more tickets.
localizations.hint_99_first: This card contains 3 tickets. How could you detach 2 of them to spend?
localizations.hint_99: The card number is a multiple of 3, corresponding to the 3 tickets. With this information, you can determine the value for 2 tickets, which you can then use at the shooting gallery.
localizations.hint_20: For this attraction, you need EXACTLY 2 tickets.
localizations.hint_69: To move the cable out of the puddle, you'll need to use something that doesn't conduct electricity.
localizations.hint_87_first: Now that the power has been restored, you can assemble this card with the cards representing the area that was without power.
localizations.hint_87: Assemble the proper cards, using the wire to guide their placement. Once correctly assembled, the cards will form a distinct shape.
localizations.hint_11: To operate the claw machine, you'll need a magnet.
localizations.hint_24: You don't have enough strength to properly wield the hammer… but you do have a blowgun!
localizations.hint_79_first: Louka is likely the owner of the trailer you came across. You also remember seeing the dinosaurs from his tattoo elsewhere throughout the park.
localizations.hint_79: Find the dinosaur-shaped balloons scattered throughout the park, and note their colors. The location of each dinosaur on Louka's tattoo is also important.
localizations.hint_36: If you find Louka, you'll also find a way to open the trailer.
localizations.hint_92_first: The eye you see above the word Zoltar… This image has been right before your eyes from the beginning!
localizations.hint_92: To receive your prediction, long press the "Review Hints" button in the app.
localizations.hint_111: These wax pencils would bring a lot of joy to a certain upset young girl.
localizations.hint_75: Ashley also has several tickets of her own. Maybe you can go with her to try an attraction meant for 2?
localizations.hint_16: This attraction is designed for two people. You need to find a partner!
localizations.hint_91_first: To enter this ride, you'll need to consult Zoltar within the trailer.
localizations.hint_91: Carefully examine the location of the hearts, as well as the word ZOLTAR at the bottom, to find instructions on how to proceed.
localizations.hint_21: You'll need to use the right object to keep your cars from drifting apart!
localizations.hint_26_first: You can deduce the numbers of the previous two seats that have passed by.
localizations.hint_26: Seats 72 and 73 have already passed by. You'll want to get on the next one.
localizations.hint_74_first: Thanks to the description provided by the announcement, you can locate the little boy who got lost; you've crossed paths with him before at the prize stall.
localizations.hint_74: Use his balloons to locate him from above, standing near the carousel. Guide the little boy along the only path that will take him to the cotton candy stall. The path creates a pair of numbers (separated as you pass under the arch).
localizations.hint_51: Follow the instructions provided to you by the boy's mother to receive your final badge.
localizations.hint_82: First, help the elderly man find the object he lost; then search for the entrance to the Big-8 roller coaster.
localizations.hint_31: You've got some money! You can exchange it for more tickets.
localizations.hint_8: The operator won't negotiate with you. You need to give her EXACTLY 8 tickets.
localizations.hint_96_first: You could use your blowgun to pop the balloon.
localizations.hint_96: Be careful! You'll need to take your speed into account when firing. Aim just to the left of the balloon.
localizations.hint_44_first: Although you were unable to acquire the Megatron, you can still get a gift for Ashely.
localizations.hint_44: Clearly, she's fond of unicorns. You've seen one before, very recently!
localizations.hint_86: Even though you're out of airsoft pellets, you still have your blowgun! You can aim it at the card to take your final shot!
localizations.hint_35_first: The sounds you hear will guide you in choosing which way to go.
localizations.hint_35: Each sound matches one of the elements found on the card. The position of each element within the card will indicate which path you must take when you hear its corresponding sound.
localizations.hint_45: To speed things up a little, make the Ferris Wheel rotate!
localizations.answer_hint_84: When assembled correctly, the two cards reveal a gap in the wire fence. Looking carefully at the gap, the you can see the number 9 outlined by the remaining parts of the fence.
localizations.answer_hint_22: When assembled correctly, the two cards reveal a gap in the wire fence. Looking carefully at the gap, the you can see the number 9 outlined by the remaining parts of the fence.
localizations.answer_hint_9:
When you overlap card 9 with the wire fence (84 and 22), the 22 becomes a 29. Now, combine the cane (18) with the gap in the wire fence (29).
18 + 29 = 47.
localizations.answer_hint_5: Combine the piece of chewing gum (5) with the cane (13) to make the end of the cane sticky. 5 + 13 = 18.
localizations.answer_hint_42: Combined the earring (42) with the stallkeeper (19). 42 + 19 = 61.
localizations.answer_hint_4: When you trace the movement of the ball under the cup, it will form the number 3.
localizations.answer_hint_30: Combine the ticket (47) with the QUACK QUACK stall (30). 47 + 30 = 77.
localizations.answer_hint_77: Once you've positioned the fishing rod's hook correctly over the final duck, the orange ducks will form a 2.
localizations.answer_hint_78: Once you've positioned the fishing rod's hook correctly over the final duck, the orange ducks will form a 2.
localizations.answer_hint_2: You can see the number 88 on the teddy bear's button.
localizations.answer_hint_88: Insert the button (88) into the coin slot (1). 88 + 1 = 89.
localizations.answer_hint_89: Use your coin (89) at the ticket booth (10). 89 + 10 = 99.
localizations.answer_hint_99: Since 99 is equivalent to 3 tickets, the number 66 is equivalent to 2 tickets. You can use a blue 66 when you need to use 2 tickets.
localizations.answer_hint_69: Use the cane (18) to push the cable out of the puddle (69). 18 + 69 = 87.
localizations.answer_hint_87: Once assembled, the 3 cards laid out will form the letter J.
localizations.answer_hint_16: Take Ashley (75) to the entrance of the Ghost Train ride (16). 75 + 16 = 91
localizations.answer_hint_91: On card A, the letters under the hearts spell out "Subtract." The word "Zoltar" is partially erased, leaving the number 7. So, subtract 70 from card 91. 91 - 70 = 21
localizations.answer_hint_75: Take Ashley (75) to the entrance of the Ghost Train ride (16). 75 + 16 = 91
localizations.answer_hint_26: You can see the number 7 on the bottom seat, while you can see a 2 on the top one. Thus, you can determine that these seats are numbered 72 and 73.  Seat 73 is broken, so you'll board the next one: 74.
localizations.answer_hint_74: Start where the little boy is holding his balloons and trace an unobstructed path to the cotton candy stall. The first part of the path will for a 5, where you reach the archway. Pass through the arch, then continue the path toward the stall, creating the number 1.  Putting these together will give you 51.
localizations.answer_hint_82: Give the cane (13) to the elderly man (18+).  Then find the card with the large number 8 printed on it.
localizations.answer_hint_31: Use the bills (31) at the ticket booth (10). 31 + 10 = 41.
localizations.answer_hint_8: Give the lady at the Big-8 entrace (8) all the tickets you've got left: the set of 7 tickets (41) and the 1 ticket from before (47).  8 + 41 + 47 = 96.
localizations.answer_hint_44: The prize stall sells an adorable unicorn. You can purchase one by returning there.
localizations.machine_36: Beep! You've entered the correct combination. You step inside the trailer.
localizations.machine_35: You've found the correct path. You complete your Ghost Train ride, and the clown at the exit gives you a badge of Bravery.
localizations.machine_45: After waiting patiently for a few minutes, you arrive at the base of the Ferris Wheel; you're next!
localizations.machine_80: Well done! You've won the machine's grand prize: a badge of Luck.
localizations.machine_70_card_19: Great shot! The object falls, and you pick it up.
localizations.machine_70_card_86_1: Bang! You manage to pop the last balloon with your blowgun without being seen. The game operator rewards you with the badge of Precision.
localizations.machine_70_card_86_2: As you proudly examine your first badge, you suddenly hear someone crying from behind the stalls. You decide to head back there to see who it is.
localizations.machine_70_card_24: Ding! You time your shot perfectly; just as the child swings the hammer, the bell rings. Completely stunned, the elderly game operator hands out badges of Strength to everyone there.
localizations.machine_70_card_96: Bang! You time your shot perfectly and hit the balloon, causing it to explode. Ashley catches the badges. As you go down, you run to join her.
localizations.machine_70_card_96_error: You overshot the target. Don't forget to adjust for your speed!
localizations.machine_45_1: To make up for this section of the park being closed earlier, the operator announces that riding the Ferris Wheel will be free tonight. This causes a long line to form as people hurry to take their turn. Given the lengthy line, it may be wiser to return later, when the excitement has died down.
localizations.machine_45_2: There's still a bit of a wait, but this is likely to be as good as it's going to get. You take your place at the end of the line.
localizations.machine_60_achat_crayons: You exchange a badge to purchase the box of was pencils.  The Megatron can wait; you're sure you can find another badge somewhere!
localizations.machine_60_achat_licorne: Congratulations! You have finally redeemed your badges for a wonderful prize - a beautiful stuffed unicorn!  You make your way up the hill and sit next to Ashley, asking her to close her eyes. As she does, you place the unicorn in her hands. When she opens her eyes again, she joyfully throws herself into your arms and kisses you on the cheek.  Hand-in-hand, you both admire the view while you await the fireworks that will signal the conclusion of this wonder ful day at the amusement park. You couldn't have imagined a better outcome!
localizations.machine_60_achat_autres: No, we need to stay focused! Only the Megatron matters!
localizations.machine_60_badges_lost: Powerless, you watch at your badges drift away.
localizations.machine_60_achat_megatron1: "Oh, sorry, kid!  I don't have the Megatron anymore. Some awful kid just stole it from me!"
localizations.machine_60_achat_megatron2: You walk away, feeling disappointed. With your hands in your pockets, you decide to spend some time alone, and make your way to the top of a small hill overlooking the amusement part. When you reach the top, however, you see Askley, who doesn't hear you approaching.
localizations.machine_45_annonce: "Attention, please! A young boy named Adam has been separated from his parents. He was last seen wearing a red cap and shoes. If you see him, please help him find his parents, who are waiting for him near the cotton candy stall."
localizations.no_mic_warning: If you're having trouble with the microphone, you can turn it off. Are you sure you want to do this?
localizations.machine_60_doug_intro: "Forget it, shorty! The Megatron is mine!"
localizations.machine_60_intro: This is Doug. He is a bully feared by all the other children. He is prepared to do whatever it takes to get the Megatron before you do.
localizations.machine_60_doug_end_1: "Not so fast, shorty! Haha, look where your badges are now!"
localizations.machine_60_doug_end_2: "You can kiss the Megatron goodbye, sucker!"
localizations.machine_86_doug: "Dang, I missed! Hey, shorty, I'm taking your last pellet so I can try again!"
